# backend/core/pii_redactor.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:42Z

## Purpose
PII redactor · Iter 26 · C8 closure.

Regex-based fallback when Presidio not installed. Composes with §76
Privacy pillar + §38.3 audit row pre-write redaction.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import re
- from `typing` import Any

## Inputs
- Env vars: INSUR_DISABLE_PRESIDIO

## Process
### Functions
- `_try_presidio()`: Returns tuple (analyzer, anonymizer) or False · idempotent.
- `redact_text(text)`: Return (redacted_text, list of {type, count, original_snippet}).
- `redact_dict(obj, fields_to_redact)`: Recursively redact dict values · respects field allowlist if provided.
- `detect_pii(text)`: Detection-only · no redaction · for audit/dashboard surfaces.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Probe Presidio · lazy + tolerant of transformers/protobuf version mismatches
- Iter 29 fix: opt-in only · audit env sets INSUR_DISABLE_PRESIDIO=1 to skip
- entirely. Catches RuntimeError too (protobuf gencode mismatch raises that).
- Regex fallback patterns (§57.7 honest: high-precision · misses edge cases)
- Iter 27 fix: PHONE pattern rewritten to actually match 555-123-4567 ·
